Day advanced to 2026-02-18.
11,922 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
160 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 2 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-02-19): ['325000', '434350']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-17 -> 2026-02-18)

- "Which U.S. government office will be identified as the source of the reposted comments that trigger the France-US diplomatic row by the end of February 2026?" → Bureau of Counterterrorism
- "Who will deliver the Democratic response to President Donald Trump’s State of the Union address in February 2026?" → Abigail Spanberger
- "What AI tool will a Dutch court bar from generating sexual imagery of real people without explicit permission by March 31, 2026?" → Grok

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (170 resolved, 160 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
